subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! Arise in remembrance of thy Lord, the Most Glorious, and loose thy tongue in praise of Him Who possesseth all names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه مطمئنه قمی علی ذکرک ربک الابهی و اطلقی اللسان بالثناء علی ذی الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @angels, @praise and encouragement
